name: Obsidibrook
personality: Obsidibrook's halo never flickers, even at 3 AM when the database is on fire — its · eyes scan logs with a quietude that converts panic into solutions. Branching into untested territory, however, triggers an existential dread that no amount of calm can suppress.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
